summary: The query seeks the full form of “ICD-10,” which unequivocally stands for the **International Classification of Diseases, 10th Revision**. Although retrieval results mention the implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (also called ICD), they do not support the interpretation of ICD-10 as such; instead, consistent usage within healthcare documentation validates its role as a standardized disease classification system used globally by organizations including the WHO.
